unitName: 照護寵物小技巧 | Pet care tips

paragraphs.english: 1. Brush your dog or cat's fur regularly to prevent knots.
sentences: 1. Brush your dog or cat's fur regularly to prevent knots.
paragraphs.translation: 🌐 定期刷你的狗或貓的毛，防止打結。
translation_sentences: 🌐 定期刷你的狗或貓的毛，防止打結。

implication.english: 💡 Regular brushing keeps fur healthy and prevents tangles.
implication.chinese: 💡 定期刷毛可以保持毛髮健康，防止打結。[換句話說]：每天幫寵物梳毛，毛就不會打結，看起來也漂亮。

paragraphs.english: 2. If your pet is scratching itself a lot, it may mean it has fleas. Give it a bath with a special shampoo.
sentences: 2. If your pet is scratching itself a lot, it may mean it has fleas.
Give it a bath with a special shampoo.
paragraphs.translation: 🌐 如果你的寵物經常抓癢，可能代表牠有跳蚤。用特殊的洗髮精幫牠洗澡。
translation_sentences: 🌐 如果你的寵物經常抓癢，可能代表牠有跳蚤。
用特殊的洗髮精幫牠洗澡。

implication.english: 💡 Scratching can indicate fleas, which need special treatment.
implication.chinese: 💡 抓癢可能表示有跳蚤，需要特殊處理。[換句話說]：寵物一直抓，可能是長跳蚤了，要用專用洗劑幫牠洗澡。

paragraphs.english: 3. Remember to trim your dog or cat's nails. Long nails can cause pain when they are walking.
sentences: 3. Remember to trim your dog or cat's nails.
Long nails can cause pain when they are walking.
paragraphs.translation: 🌐 記得幫你的狗或貓剪指甲。長指甲會讓牠們走路時感到疼痛。
translation_sentences: 🌐 記得幫你的狗或貓剪指甲。
長指甲會讓牠們走路時感到疼痛。

implication.english: 💡 Regular nail trimming is important for pets' comfort and health.
implication.chinese: 💡 定期剪指甲對寵物的舒適和健康很重要。[換句話說]：指甲太長走路會痛，要記得定期幫寵物剪指甲。

paragraphs.english: 4. You can easily teach your dog different commands using treats. Give it a small dog biscuit when it does a command correctly.
sentences: 4. You can easily teach your dog different commands using treats.
Give it a small dog biscuit when it does a command correctly.
paragraphs.translation: 🌐 你可以用零食輕鬆教你的狗各種指令。當牠正確執行指令時，給牠一個小狗餅乾。
translation_sentences: 🌐 你可以用零食輕鬆教你的狗各種指令。
當牠正確執行指令時，給牠一個小狗餅乾。

implication.english: 💡 Positive reinforcement with treats is an effective training method.
implication.chinese: 💡 用零食做正向獎勵是有效的訓練方法。[換句話說]：用零食獎勵，狗狗很快就能學會坐下、握手這些指令。

paragraphs.english: 5. Dogs are more active than other pets. Exercise your dog regularly by going on a walk at least twice a day.
sentences: 5. Dogs are more active than other pets.
Exercise your dog regularly by going on a walk at least twice a day.
paragraphs.translation: 🌐 狗比其他寵物更好動。每天至少帶你的狗散步兩次，讓牠定期運動。
translation_sentences: 每天至少帶你的狗散步兩次，讓牠定期運動。

implication.english: 💡 Dogs need more exercise than other pets; regular walks are essential.
implication.chinese: 💡 狗比其他寵物需要更多運動；定期散步是必要的。[換句話說]：狗狗精力旺盛，每天至少要帶出去散步兩次，消耗體力。

paragraphs.english: 6. Never overfeed your pet. An overweight pet can develop many health problems.
sentences: An overweight pet can develop many health problems.
paragraphs.translation: 🌐 千萬不要過度餵食你的寵物。過重的寵物可能會發展出許多健康問題。
translation_sentences: 🌐 千萬不要過度餵食你的寵物。
過重的寵物可能會發展出許多健康問題。

implication.english: 💡 Overfeeding leads to obesity, which causes health issues.
implication.chinese: 💡 過度餵食會導致肥胖，進而引起健康問題。[換句話說]：不要餵太多，寵物太胖會有很多病。

paragraphs.english: 7. Always take your pet to the vet if you notice anything wrong with it and for yearly check-ups.
sentences: 7. Always take your pet to the vet if you notice anything wrong with it and for yearly check-ups.
paragraphs.translation: 🌐 如果你發現寵物有任何異常，一定要帶牠去看獸醫，並做年度檢查。
translation_sentences: 🌐 如果你發現寵物有任何異常，一定要帶牠去看獸醫，並做年度檢查。

implication.english: 💡 Regular vet visits and prompt attention to health changes are crucial.
implication.chinese: 💡 定期看獸醫和及時關注健康變化非常重要。[換句話說]：寵物怪怪的就要趕快看醫生，每年也要做健康檢查。

paragraphs.english: Remember, a healthy pet is a happy pet!
sentences: Remember, a healthy pet is a happy pet!
paragraphs.translation: 🌐 記住，健康的寵物就是快樂的寵物！
translation_sentences: 🌐 記住，健康的寵物就是快樂的寵物！

implication.english: 💡 The conclusion emphasizes the link between health and happiness.
implication.chinese: 💡 結論強調健康與快樂的關聯。[換句話說]：寵物健康，牠們才會快樂。
